widgetLegend.TIER_SELECT: priced cards, pick 1 -> sets base price (use option.priceModifier as the tier price)
widgetLegend.TIER_QUANTITY: each option has its own qty stepper; line = option.unitPrice * qty
widgetLegend.AREA_INPUT: sqft number -> multiplies config.ratePerSqft (options may add/subtract per-sqft via priceModifierPerSqft)
